articles.author: Catherine Belton
articles.title: A new foothold for Moscow in Europe after Bulgaria election - The Washington Post
articles.description: After the defeat of Hungary’s Viktor Orban, the victory in Bulgaria by Rumen Radev will install a new pro-Russian voice within the European Union.
articles.content: Russia looked set to regain a degree of leverage inside the European Union after Bulgarias Kremlin-friendly former president Rumen Radev won a resounding majority in an election that will allow his p… [+38 chars]
